# ISM OSCAL Snapshot Placeholder

v0.2 seeds a small deterministic source-control catalogue for implementation testing. The full ASD/ACSC OSCAL snapshot for `v2026.03.24` belongs under this directory when the reproducible ingest command is expanded.

Source: https://github.com/AustralianCyberSecurityCentre/ism-oscal
